name: Brazilian Brownies (Pedacinhos De Chocolate)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: The Art of Brazilian Cookery by Dolores Botafogo
1. Melt butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add eggs, then the sifted mixture of flour, baking powder, and cocoa.
3. Stir in white wine.
4. Pour batter into an 8-inch greased baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
6. Cut into small squares while still hot.
